items.evidence: build.gradle.kts serialSlingerVersion=2.0.13 with blank suffix; package.json and package-lock.json are 2.0.13; npm run jdeploy:release-preflight confirmed Gradle base/display/package 2.0.13.
androidApp/build.gradle.kts versionCode bumped from 20 to 21; versionName remains root serialSlingerDisplayVersion, so Android will report 2.0.13.

Passed npm run jdeploy:release-preflight, ./gradlew check, ./gradlew prepareDesktopJdeployBundle verifyDesktopJdeployBundle, ./gradlew shared:desktopTest, ./gradlew androidApp:compileDebugKotlin, npm run jdeploy:pack-preview, gitleaks detect . --no-banner, git diff --check, and local jDeploy prepare/package/install-local/verify-install/local launch.

Reviewed Arducon clone eligibility and SYN guard behavior across shared, Android, and desktop paths; Android-specific USB target preservation and finish-date crash fixes do not require desktop equivalents.

items.evidence: Prepared release notes: SerialSlinger 2.0.13 improves Arducon support by pausing transmissions during protected operations, fixing Android FTDI clone targeting, allowing Arducon clone without SignalSlinger-only frequency fields, and fixing Android far-future finish-date selection.

main fast-forwarded to Development_Android release commit bc35ceb before tagging; git status reported main ahead of origin/main with release commits and no working tree changes before this checklist update.
